title: Seeing who changed permissions
excerpt: So I’m using a board for our company and I had the permissions set a specific way but when I came in this morning, they were changed. I went under activity and see where/when the issue was corrected. But I cant see when …

posts.author: nstephenson (Nate Stephenson)
posts.cookedHtml: So I’m using a board for our company and I had the permissions set a specific way but when I came in this morning, they were changed. I went under activity and see where/when the issue was corrected. But I cant see when it happened. Is there an easy way to find this information?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @nstephenson!

This is actually activity the board owner can view in the activity log:

Screen Shot 2023-04-20 at 1.32.12 pm1064×100 8.55 KB

Let me know if this is the information you’re looking for!

posts.author: nstephenson (Nate Stephenson)
posts.cookedHtml: So the problem I’m running into is that the activity log shows when it was corrected, but for the life of me, I can’t see when it was changed originally. And it actually just happened yesterday on another board.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Ah I see… I am afraid at this time the only way to pinpoint when this change occurred would be to scroll through the activity log and monitor for any changes - which I recognise is not ideal, particularly for a large board. I apologise for the setback here! I am going to follow up internally about this and check whether filtering by permissions is something we’d consider developing for the activity log. I will circle back here once I have a response
